input.old_string:
<<<<<<< HEAD
=======
- ACTA-1: Read-only MCP surface via AWS Bedrock AgentCore Gateway — OpenAPI 3.0 spec (`mcp/openapi-readonly.json`) exposing 18 GET endpoints as MCP tools, with Okta JWT authentication. New `250-agentcore` Terraform stack for Gateway, target, OAuth2 credential provider, and workload identity resources. Spacelift stacks added for dev and prod.
- ACTA-1: Session state integrity verification — SHA-256 hash computed on save, verified on restore to detect tampering; branch-scoped session lookup to limit cross-branch poisoning
- ACTA-1: Security prompt injection testing
- AH-119: Week-on-week percentage difference labels on stats page trend charts — each bar displays the percentage change from the previous week (green for increase, red for decrease), and chart card headings show a WoW badge for the latest week
- AH-118: Add `/changelog` page to the dashboard — auto-generated from merged PRs via GitHub API, grouped by date and category (Features, Bug Fixes, Improvements), with Jira ticket links and PR metadata. Changelog generation step added to both deploy-dev and deploy-prod jobs in `deploy-dashboard.yml`.
- ACTA-1: Profile section in settings panel showing user name, email, admin status, and Okta groups

module "aws_default_tags" {
  source  = "spacelift.io/cko-core-terraform/tags/aws"
  version = "3.6.1"

  generate_name_tag = false
  service           = var.service
  env               = var.env
  product           = var.product
  pillar            = var.pillar
  team              = var.team
  pci               = var.pci
  repo              = var.repo
}

input.new_string:
################################################################################
# AgentCore stacks (250-agentcore — MCP Gateway)
################################################################################

module "cko-agent-hal-agentcore" {
  source  = "spacelift.io/cko-core-terraform/stack/spacelift"
  version = "6.8.3"

  name_prefixes    = ["agentcore"]
  repository       = "agent-hal"
  branches         = ["dev"]
  cko_component_id = null

  terraform_workflow_tool  = "OPEN_TOFU"
  terraform_version        = "1.9.1"
  worker_pool_id           = data.spacelift_worker_pool.cko-core-platform.id
  administrative           = false
  autodeploy               = true
  autoretry                = false
  local_preview            = true
  drift_detection_enabled  = true
  drift_detection_schedule = ["0 1 * * *"]
  labels                   = ["cko"]

  context_attachments = local.context_attachments
  policy_attachments  = local.policy_attachments

  project_roots = [
    "/terraform/250-agentcore"
  ]

  project_root_label_mapping = {
    "terraform/250-agentcore" = [
      "folder:agent-hal",
      "component:agent-hal",
      "env:dev"
    ]
  }

  project_root_to_ci_mapping = [
    {
      root                   = "agentcore/agent-hal/dev/terraform/250-agentcore"
      cloud_integration_name = "cko-agentic-engineers-cko-sl-integration"
      enabled                = true
    }
  ]
}

module "cko-agent-hal-agentcore-prod" {
  source  = "spacelift.io/cko-core-terraform/stack/spacelift"
  version = "6.8.3"

  name_prefixes    = ["agentcore-prod"]
  repository       = "agent-hal"
  branches         = ["main"]
  cko_component_id = null

  terraform_workflow_tool  = "OPEN_TOFU"
  terraform_version        = "1.9.1"
  worker_pool_id           = data.spacelift_worker_pool.cko-core-platform.id
  administrative           = false
  autodeploy               = false
  autoretry                = false
  local_preview            = true
  drift_detection_enabled  = true
  drift_detection_schedule = ["0 1 * * *"]
  labels                   = ["cko"]

  context_attachments = local.context_attachments
  policy_attachments  = local.policy_attachments

  project_roots = [
    "/terraform/250-agentcore"
  ]

  project_root_label_mapping = {
    "terraform/250-agentcore" = [
      "folder:agent-hal",
      "component:agent-hal",
      "env:prod"
    ]
  }

  project_root_to_ci_mapping = [
    {
      root                   = "agentcore-prod/agent-hal/main/terraform/250-agentcore"
      cloud_integration_name = "cko-agentic-engineers-cko-sl-integration"
      enabled                = true
    }
  ]
}

################################################################################
# Service stacks — prod (200-service)
################################################################################

module "cko-agent-hal-service-prod" {
